</mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QKB-_L8LIQsU31dJOqb2-33" value=""a"" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontFamily=Maple Mono NF CN;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="447" y="460" width="50" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QKB-_L8LIQsU31dJOqb2-35" value="1) 将文本编码为Token IDs" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontFamily=Maple Mono NF CN;fontColor=light-dark(#000000,#FFFF66);" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-80" y="30" width="200" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QKB-_L8LIQsU31dJOqb2-36" value="2) GPT模型返回了一个形状为[4, 50257]的矩阵" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontFamily=Maple Mono NF CN;fontColor=light-dark(#000000,#FFFF66);" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="345" y="40" width="200" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QKB-_L8LIQsU31dJOqb2-37" value="3) 提取最后一个向量，该向量对应于GPT模型生成的下一个Token" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontFamily=Maple Mono NF CN;fontColor=light-dark(#000000,#FFFF66);" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="180" width="230" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QKB-_L8LIQsU31dJOqb2-38" value="4) 使用Softmax将logits转换为概率分布" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontFamily=Maple Mono NF CN;fontColor=light-dark(#000000,#FFFF66);" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="285" width="230" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QKB-_L8LIQsU31dJOqb2-39" value="5) 确定概率最大的索引位置，该位置也代表Token ID" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontFamily=Maple Mono NF CN;fontColor=light-dark(#000000,#FFFF66);" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="600" y="380" width="230" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QKB-_L8LIQsU31dJOqb2-40" value="6) 将Token在下一轮执行之前追加到输入中" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontFamily=Maple Mono NF CN;fontColor=light-dark(#000000,#FFFF66);" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="420" width="230" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: 2) GPT模型返回了一个形状为[4, 50257]的矩阵

div.div: 3) 提取最后一个向量，该向量对应于GPT模型生成的下一个Token

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 280px; margin-left: 642px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div: 4) 使用Softmax将logits转换为概率分布

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 375px; margin-left: 682px;

div.div: 5) 确定概率最大的索引位置，该位置也代表Token ID

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 415px; margin-left: 172px;

div.div: 6) 将Token在下一轮执行之前追加到输入中
